title: More Nonsense Limerick 85
content:
There was a young lady of Corsica,
    Who purchased a little brown saucy-cur;
    Which she fed upon ham, 
    And hot raspberry jam,
    That expensive young lady of Corsica.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 85"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
